headline: Top Invesco Analyst: The AI Trade That “Lifted All Boats” Is Over. Now Profitability Decides Winners As “Capacity Will Catch Up”
summary: Invesco’s Fiona Lim says the AI-fueled semiconductor surge is shifting from a broad, momentum-driven rally to a tougher phase where stock picking and profitability will separate winners from laggards. Speaking on Bloomberg’s Insight with Haslinda Amin on July 3, Lim, who manages Asia ex-Japan equities, warned that the easy gains are likely behind investors: “The ... headline: Up 140% YTD, Three Catalysts Will Take AMD to New Highs In 2026
summary: Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) has become the semiconductor story of 2026. Shares are up 152.56% year-to-date, driven by an AI infrastructure buildout that keeps expanding faster than the market can price in. Our 24/7 Wall St. price target for AMD is $589.73, roughly 9.03% above where the stock trades today. Our model rates AMD a ... Up 140% YTD, Three Catalysts Will Take AMD to New Highs In 2026
